notes: 14 beats (13 locked + BEAT 11.5 weaponization addition 2026-05-25). Disappointment-not-rage tone. Voter is protagonist. Real archival YouTube footage only for named politicians (NO AI faces). Wikimedia stills + ken-burns acceptable as quiet alternative to motion clips. Per founder lock: shorts are text+music — this is LONG-FORM so VO is the spine. C-SPAN sources require cropTopPct: 0.75. Most YouTube IDs unknown at storyboard time — pipeline will resolve via yt-dlp search_fallback queries on Tuesday.

fair_use_envelope_check.notes: Every YouTube-archival source is well under the 90s-per-source cap. Largest single source is C-SPAN at 28s across 4 shots (cropTopPct: 0.75 applied to each); AP-Archive grew to 25s with BEAT 11.5 weaponization additions (Khalil chyron + A.C.L.U. press b-roll). Remotion cards carry the bulk (~80%) of screen time — consistent with the SEALED audit-document aesthetic and zero-AI-faces rule.
